description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:latest Docker image and defines a REPO_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/MatteoCampinoti94/faapi-go. Add a global before_script that runs `mkdir -p $GOPATH/src/$(dirname $REPO_NAME)`, `ln -svf $CI_PROJECT_DIR $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME`, `cd $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME`, and `go get ./...`. Define two stages, test and build. In the test stage add a format job that executes `go fmt $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)`, `go vet $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)`, and `go test -race $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)`. In the build stage add a compile job that runs `go build -race -ldflags "-extldflags '-static'" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/mybinary`, publishes the mybinary file as an artifact, and runs only on tag pipelines.
